description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On April 20, 2026 (Reiwa 8), the bracket for the Spring Saitama Prefecture High School Baseball Tournament was announced.

Seibo Gakuen High School will face Omiya Kita High School on April 24 at UD Tracks Ageo Stadium. Hanno High School, which advanced through the district preliminaries for the first time in 10 years, will face Urawa Gakuin on April 25 at Omiya Park Baseball Stadium.

We look forward to the support of all Hanno residents.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202604/13465.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: 2026 Spring Saitama Prefecture High School Baseball Tournament Bracket Announced
